title: Password Reset
summary: Reset the password for an existing user account that has been forgotten or expired.

title: Account Unlock
summary: Unlock a user account that has been locked out due to too many failed login attempts.

title: MFA Enrolment
summary: Enrol a user in multi-factor authentication for an application or system.

title: VPN Access Request
summary: Request remote access to the internal network via VPN for a user or device.

title: Privilege Elevation Request
summary: Request elevated permissions or administrator rights for a specific application or system task.

title: New User Account
summary: Create a new user account in Active Directory or a specific application for a staff member.

title: Account Deactivation
summary: Disable or deactivate a user account for a departing staff member or contractor.

title: Laptop Replacement
summary: Replace a faulty, damaged, or end-of-life laptop with a new or refurbished device.

title: Monitor Request
summary: Request an additional or replacement monitor for a workstation setup.

title: Keyboard and Mouse
summary: Request a replacement or additional keyboard and mouse for a workstation.

title: Mobile Device Setup
summary: Configure and provision a smartphone or tablet for a staff member.

title: Docking Station
summary: Request or set up a docking station for a laptop at a fixed workstation.

title: Hardware Fault Report
summary: Report a hardware fault or defect with an existing device for assessment or repair.

title: Peripheral Setup
summary: Set up or configure a peripheral device such as a webcam, headset, or scanner.

title: New Staff Onboarding
summary: Set up accounts, devices, and access for a new staff member starting with the organisation.

title: Role Change Setup
summary: Update system access and permissions when a staff member changes role or department.

title: Contractor Access Setup
summary: Provision temporary system access and accounts for a contractor or external party.

title: Staff Offboarding
summary: Revoke access, retrieve equipment, and close accounts when a staff member leaves the organisation.

title: Equipment Return
summary: Arrange the return of organisation-owned equipment from a staff member or contractor.

title: Shared Mailbox Setup
summary: Create a shared email mailbox accessible by a team or group of users.

title: Distribution List Management
summary: Create, update, or remove an email distribution list or mailing group.

title: Software Licence Request
summary: Request a new software licence or seat for an application required for work purposes.

title: Application Access
summary: Request access to an existing application or system for a user who does not currently have it.

title: Browser Plugin Approval
summary: Request approval to install a browser extension or plugin on a managed device.

title: SaaS Account Setup
summary: Set up an account in a cloud-hosted software-as-a-service application.

title: Version Upgrade Request
summary: Request an upgrade to a newer version of an installed application.

title: Application Fault Report
summary: Report a bug, error, or unexpected behaviour in an application or system.

title: Custom Software Install
summary: Request installation of software not in the standard catalogue, subject to approval.

title: Wi-Fi Access
summary: Connect a device to the corporate wireless network or request access credentials.

title: Network Drive Mapping
summary: Map a shared network drive or folder to a user's workstation for file access.

title: Firewall Rule Request
summary: Request a firewall rule change to allow or block specific network traffic.

title: Static IP Assignment
summary: Assign a static IP address to a device or server on the network.

title: Remote Desktop Setup
summary: Set up remote desktop access so a user can connect to their work computer from another location.

title: Network Printer Setup
summary: Connect a user or workstation to a network-attached printer.

title: Network Fault Report
summary: Report a network outage, slow connection, or connectivity issue for investigation.

title: General IT Enquiry
summary: Ask a general question about IT systems, policies, or services not covered by a specific request.

title: Incident Report
summary: Report an unplanned IT outage or service degradation affecting one or more users.

title: Service Request
summary: Submit a formal request for a standard IT service or product.

title: Change Request
summary: Request a planned change to an IT system, configuration, or process.

title: Major Incident
summary: Report a critical outage or high-impact event requiring urgent escalation and response.

title: Service Escalation
summary: Escalate an unresolved or delayed service request or incident to a higher support tier.

title: Shared Drive Access
summary: Request access to a shared network folder or drive for a user or team.

title: File Recovery
summary: Recover a deleted or corrupted file from backup storage.

title: Storage Quota Increase
summary: Request an increase to a user's or team's allocated storage quota.

title: Backup Request
summary: Schedule or manually trigger a backup of data or system state.

title: Archive Access
summary: Request access to archived files or records that are no longer on active storage.

title: Data Migration
summary: Move data from one system, location, or format to another as part of a transition.

title: Security Incident Report
summary: Report a suspected security breach, unauthorised access, or data loss event.

title: Phishing Report
summary: Report a suspected phishing email or social engineering attempt received by a staff member.

title: USB Exception Request
summary: Request an exception to the USB device policy to use a specific removable storage device.

title: Audit Log Access
summary: Request access to system or application audit logs for compliance or investigation purposes.

title: Certificate Renewal
summary: Renew an expiring SSL certificate or digital certificate for a system or service.

title: Security Awareness Training
summary: Enrol a user or team in mandatory or optional security awareness training.
